description: Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that models the frequency dependence of network parameters. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = set_netfrq(status) ierr, status = set_netfrq()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
